title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. campestris
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. campestris, also known as field eyebright, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia officinalis plant, a type of flowering plant native to Europe, particularly in grasslands and meadows. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, making it effective in treating eye infections, conjunctivitis, and other eye-related issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. campestris include soothing and calming the eyes, reducing inflammation, and promoting healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for eye problems and respiratory issues such as colds and sinusitis. Euphrasia officinalis subsp. campestris is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and eye drops, and is also used in homeopathic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
